narrative:
Jefferson Twp township has 3,456 registered voters, with 58.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.9%, a clear Republican lean of 9.6 percentage points.
